intitule: Reading Comprehension: Identifying Rooms and Furniture

enonce.texte:
Read the text below about a house and answer the questions that follow.

My Dream House

My dream house has five rooms. The living room is large and comfortable. There is a big sofa in the living room. The kitchen is modern with a fridge and a cooker. The bedroom has a double bed beside the window. There are two bathrooms in the house. The dining room is near the kitchen. I love my house because it is very cozy.
images: A simple floor plan of a house showing different rooms: living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, and dining room, with basic furniture drawn inside each room.

questions.texte: List the rooms mentioned in the text.
questions.reponse: Living room, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, dining room.

questions.texte: Where is the sofa located according to the text?
questions.reponse: The sofa is in the living room.

questions.texte: Where is the bed located in the bedroom?
questions.reponse: The bed is beside the window.

questions.texte: Why does the author love their house?
questions.reponse: The author loves their house because it is very cozy.

enonce.texte: Match the words on the left with their definitions on the right. Write the correct letter next to each number.
images: A simple illustration showing different rooms and furniture items: living room with sofa, kitchen with table, bedroom with bed, and bathroom with sink.

questions.texte: Match the words with their definitions:

sousQuestions.reponse: d. A room where people relax and entertain guests
a. A room where people cook and prepare food
e. A room where people sleep
b. A room where people take a bath or shower
c. A room where people eat meals

enonce.texte: Complete the sentences with the correct preposition of place: in, at, on, under, beside, near.
images: A simple illustration of a room with furniture: a table in the center, a chair beside it, a lamp on the table, a bed near the window, and a rug under the table.

questions.texte: The lamp is _______ the table.
The chair is _______ the table.
The books are _______ the shelf.
The cat is sleeping _______ the bed.
The kitchen is _______ the dining room.
I am _______ home right now.

enonce.texte: Write a short paragraph (5-7 sentences) describing your house or apartment. Include the names of at least three rooms and mention the furniture in each room. Use at least three prepositions of place (in, at, on, under, beside, near).
images: A simple illustration of a house with rooms labeled: living room with sofa and TV, kitchen with table and chairs, bedroom with bed and wardrobe, bathroom with sink and bathtub.

questions.texte: Write a paragraph describing your house or apartment. Include rooms, furniture, and prepositions of place.
questions.reponse:
This is a creative writing task. Example response:
My house has three rooms. The living room is large. There is a sofa in the living room. The TV is on the table. The kitchen is near the living room. There is a fridge and a cooker in the kitchen. The bedroom has a bed beside the window. I love my house.

enonce.texte: Draw a simple picture of your bedroom or living room. Label at least five pieces of furniture or items in the room. Then, write a short description using prepositions of place.
images: A simple outline drawing of a room with furniture: bed, wardrobe, desk, chair, lamp, and window, with empty labels to be filled in.

questions.texte: Draw and label your room. Write a description using prepositions of place.
questions.reponse:
This is a drawing and writing task. Example description:
This is my bedroom. There is a bed beside the window. A desk is near the bed. The lamp is on the desk. There is a wardrobe in the corner. My bag is under the desk.

enonce.texte:
Read the text below and answer the questions.

Furniture in a House

In a house, there are many types of furniture. In the living room, we often find a sofa, an armchair, a coffee table, and a TV stand. In the kitchen, there is a table, chairs, and cabinets. In the bedroom, there is a bed, a wardrobe, and a bedside table. In the bathroom, there is a sink, a toilet, and sometimes a bathtub. Furniture makes a house comfortable and beautiful.
images: A simple illustration of a house with rooms showing furniture: living room with sofa and coffee table, kitchen with table and chairs, bedroom with bed and wardrobe, bathroom with sink and bathtub.

questions.texte: What furniture is mentioned in the living room?
questions.reponse: Sofa, armchair, coffee table, TV stand.

questions.texte: What furniture is in the kitchen?
What is the purpose of furniture in a house according to the text?
questions.reponse: Furniture makes a house comfortable and beautiful.

enonce.texte: Look at the picture and complete the sentences with the correct preposition of place.
images: A detailed illustration of a living room with furniture: a sofa in the center, a table in front of it, a lamp on the table, a picture on the wall, a rug under the table, and a bookshelf near the window.

questions.texte: The sofa is _______ the living room.
The lamp is _______ the table.
The rug is _______ the table.
The picture is _______ the wall.
The bookshelf is _______ the window.
